name: Peanut Butter Broiled Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, brown sugar, and peanut butter together until smooth.
2. Gradually add milk and stir well to combine all ingredients.
3. Stir in chopped nuts.
4. Spread the frosting over a warm cake.
5. Place under the broiler about 4 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil for a few seconds or until the topping begins to bubble.
7. Watch carefully to avoid scorching.
